steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The first sentence places the painting's feature in a completed past event: it was featured in a 2013 exhibition. The blank describes when it was chosen for that exhibition — an action that had to happen before the featuring. The verb form must show an earlier past action.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘is’: simple present. Places the choosing in the present, contradicting the 2013 past context. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘had been’: past perfect. Shows the choosing was completed before the other past action (the featuring). Correctly sequences the two past events. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘will be’: future tense. Contradicts the established 2013 date. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘is being’: present progressive. Places the choosing in the present, contradicting the past context. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
